title: [Greatroom]
description: High ceilings make this room feel larger than it is.  The front hosts brocade armchairs facing a small fireplace.  Over the mantel, a colorful painting is hung.  A dark wood display case cordons off the back of the room.  In one corner, a long oak counter isolates a cast iron stove and a large oak pantry.  A maoral table and an antique wood buffet occupy the other corner.  A set of stained glass doors leads out the back.  A large expanse of windows allow muted sunlight to fill the room.  Near the front door, a tall window provides a view of guests.

wayto.27860: ;e door='oak door';key=GameObj.inv.find{|k| k.name=='cord-strung delicate brass key';};if !key.nil? then multifput "remove ##{key.id}",  "unlock #{door}", "open #{door}", "go #{door}", "close #{door}", "lock #{door}", "wear ##{key.id}"; end;
wayto.27865: ;e door='stained door';key=GameObj.inv.find{|k| k.name=='cord-strung delicate brass key';};if !key.nil? then multifput "remove ##{key.id}",  "unlock #{door}", "open #{door}", "go #{door}", "close #{door}", "lock #{door}", "wear ##{key.id}"; end;

timeto.27860: ;e key=GameObj.inv.find{|k| k.name=='cord-strung delicate brass key';};if !key.nil? then 5 else nil end;
timeto.27865: ;e key=GameObj.inv.find{|k| k.name=='cord-strung delicate brass key';};if !key.nil? then 5 else nil end;
